overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a red coat and white hat riding a train through rural western landscapes, then standing up to walk through the carriages and exit onto the exterior platform beside livestock pens.

scene_state.functional_zone: passenger train carriage with view of rural countryside

events.description: train passes by wooden rural buildings and farmhouses
landscape opens to wide grassy fields with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: sitting on the train seat looking out the window at the passing scenery

notable_agents.action: passenger in blue shirt sitting in the seat ahead, facing forward

entered.detail: train seats with green patterned fabric and brass fittings
white lace curtains hanging along the train windows
dark polished wood walls and trim inside the carriage
western-style wooden structures visible through the windows

segments.scene_description: The character sits in a vintage train carriage with green upholstered seats and lace curtains, passing through rural countryside with wooden farm buildings and open grasslands visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: train carriage passing through rocky cuttings

events.description: train enters shaded rocky cutting reducing interior light significantly
rock walls pass very close to the train windows on the left side

agents.ego_description: still seated, watching the rocky terrain and cliffs pass by the window

entered.detail: large gray rock walls passing close to the train windows

segments.scene_description: The train enters a rocky cutting where cliffs pass close to the windows, dimming the interior light. The landscape outside changes from open fields to rocky terrain with dense vegetation.

events.description: character stands up from the seat and begins walking forward
character walks through connecting doorway into the next train carriage

agents.ego_description: standing up and walking through the train corridor toward the exit at the end of the carriage

notable_agents.action: passenger sitting in the next carriage visible through the connecting doorway

entered.detail: narrow walkway between rows of seats leading toward the exit
glass oil lamps hanging from the ceiling of the carriage
open doorway leading to the next train car with exterior platform visible

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and walks through the train corridor, passing hanging oil lamps and moving through the connecting doorway into the next carriage while the train continues moving.

scene_state.functional_zone: train exterior platform alongside livestock loading area

events.description: character steps off the train onto the exterior wooden platform
character walks past wooden pens containing grazing sheep

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow exterior platform of the moving train, holding the side railing

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing in the wooden fenced pens beside the train tracks

entered.detail: narrow wooden platform along the side of the dark green train car
rough wooden fenced enclosures for holding livestock
partly cloudy sky visible above the train and landscape

segments.scene_description: The character exits the train onto the exterior wooden platform, walking alongside the moving train car past livestock pens containing sheep, with open sky and rural landscape visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cozy interior of a vintage train carriage out onto an open-air platform moving through the countryside. It begins with the character seated among green upholstered seats and lace curtains, watching wooden farm buildings and grasslands drift past the windows. As the train enters a rocky cutting, the interior light dims and the view shifts to steep cliffs and dense vegetation pressing close to the glass. The camera then follows the character as they stand and navigate the corridor past hanging oil lamps, moving through a connecting doorway into the next carriage. Finally, the scene opens up as the character exits onto the exterior wooden platform, walking alongside the moving train past livestock pens filled with sheep under a wide, open sky.
